stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 696 file 4.12. 
The ZFM of an aeroplane is equal to 48 000 kg and the CG position is at 25 % MAC. Which one of the statements below is correct ?

options.a: The index at ZFM is outside the allowed CG range.
options.b: A ZFM of 48 000 kg is not allowed for this aircraft type.
options.c: The graph does not provide enough information to assess compliance with the CG limit.
options.d: The index at ZFM is within limits and in an aft position.
